statement.p: Two numbers sum is -1, and their product is -90. Find these two numbers.

solution.p: Lets call the first number x. Since these two numbers sum is -1, the second number must be -1-x.
Its given that their product is -90, so we can write and solve the equation:
To get rid of the leading negative sign, we multiple each term in the equation by -1:
The polynomial can be factored, so we will solve the equation by factoring:
This result shows the first number could be 9 or -10.
Recall that the second number is -1-x, where x is the first number.
If the first number is 9, the second number is -1-(9)=-10. If the first number is -10, the second number is -1-(-10)=9. Either way, the two numbers are 9 and -10.
